name: career-database
description: Bootstrap and maintain a durable, AI-native career database -- a Claim-to-Proof markdown substrate that resumes, LinkedIn copy, cover letters, and interview prep are generated from rather than maintained alongside. Provides a ~25-file template tree, Tier 1-5 prioritization framework, operational files (SESSION / OPEN_QUESTIONS / DECISIONS / OPPORTUNITIES) that survive across sessions, frontmatter schemas with provenance + as-of dating discipline, workflows for source mining, brain-dump interviewing, audit, artifact generation, per-opening tailoring, and interview prep. The database is markdown; the user owns it end-to-end; the skill is the discipline.
